namespace TUnit.Mocks.Generated
{
    public sealed class IRepository_T_Mock<T> : global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::IRepository<T>>, global::IRepository<T>
    {
        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        internal IRepository_T_Mock(global::IRepository<T> mockObject, global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository<T>> engine)
            : base(mockObject, engine) { }

        T global::IRepository<T>.GetById(int id) => Object.GetById(id);

        void global::IRepository<T>.Save(T entity)
        {
            Object.Save(entity);
        }
    }
}

namespace TUnit.Mocks.Generated
{
    file sealed class IRepository_T_MockImpl<T> : global::IRepository<T>, global::TUnit.Mocks.IRaisable, global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject
    {
        private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository<T>> _engine;

        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

        internal IRepository_T_MockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository<T>> engine)
        {
            _engine = engine;
        }

        public T GetById(int id)
        {
            return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<T, int>(0, "GetById", id, default!);
        }

        public void Save(T entity)
        {
            _engine.HandleCall<T>(1, "Save", entity);
        }

        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
        {
            throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
        }
    }

    file static class IRepository_T_MockFactory
    {
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Register()
        {
            global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterOpenGenericFactory(
                typeof(global::IRepository<>),
                typeof(IRepository_T_MockImpl<>),
                typeof(IRepository_T_Mock<>));
        }

    }
}

    {
        private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess _engine;

    public static class IRepository_T__MockStaticExtension
    {
        extension<T>(global::IRepository<T> _)
        {
